name: Bluesky AT Protocol API
description: Bluesky social network API based on the AT Protocol (atproto). Uses XRPC (a Lexicon-based RPC framework), not standard REST/OpenAPI. This spec provides a minimal representation of key XRPC endpoints. The canonical API definitions are AT Protocol Lexicon schemas at github.com/bluesky-social/atproto.
